legacy.full_text:
Game 65 Notes

- good series!
- Carson Benge is so fucking good
- hilarious for the zoomer to go 5-for-5 on 6/7
- Can’t believe how adequate Manaea looks
- A-team bullpen besides Devin on fire
- Semien actually looks good
- could be worse!

- I hate this team so much

Carson Benge Vs. LHP -> 0.342 BA | 0.432 OBP | 0.958 OPS

Glad to see #Mets are letting Benge & A.J. Ewing get their AB versus LHP -> they are too good to sit.
